contact.heading: Contact
contact.jobValue: Marketing Operations | Management Trainee | Project Management | Brand Operations

about.heading: About Me
about.p1: I am a student practitioner specializing in project operations and execution. Across my student leadership and project experiences, I have consistently applied structured thinking to drive action — from project decomposition and process design to resource integration and on-the-ground execution.
about.p2: I believe great operations is not just about getting things done — it is about building reusable systems and standards (SOPs) that enable teams to collaborate efficiently within a clear framework.
about.p3: Whether managing a large student team or building a society's brand identity from scratch, I am driven by turning chaos into order and ideas into outcomes.
about.p4: My core strengths lie in project planning and coordination, cross-functional communication, and maintaining execution discipline under high-pressure, multi-threaded environments. I thrive on the 0-to-1 journey and take pleasure in continuously optimizing existing systems.

caseStudy.reflectionSubtitle: Not just a project showcase — my growth and thinking
caseStudy.reflectionContentPlanningText: Established a four-pillar content matrix covering solar terms, holidays, events, and artworks — maintaining consistent publishing rhythm while concentrating efforts at key moments.
caseStudy.reflectionEventPlanningText: Curated "Calligraphy+" event series, leveraging cross-category collaborations to boost content freshness and reach.
caseStudy.reflectionBrandText: Built visual identity from scratch with unified templates and poster guidelines, establishing a recognizable brand presence.
caseStudy.reflectionDataText: Continuously tracked views, engagement rate, and follower growth — using data to inform content strategy optimization.
caseStudy.reflectionRetroText: Conducted structured retrospectives after every major event, documenting insights into reusable operational SOPs.
